title: (Bullish Signal) TBK, MACD Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling TBK's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor identified 46 similar cases where TBK's MACD histogram became positive, and 35 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 76%. Current price $93.19 is above $92.61 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 03/03/21 - 04/05/21, the price experienced a +14% Uptrend. During the week of 03/26/21 - 04/05/21, the stock enjoyed a +18% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/1hdky85kdlr61.png?width=1521&format=png&auto=webp&s=654ef959393d058af950927d523495604c9349a5

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 42 of 52 cases where TBK's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 81%.

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on April 05, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on TBK as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 72 of 94 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 77%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for TBK just turned positive on April 05, 2021. Looking at past instances where TBK's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 35 of 46 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 76%.

TBK moved above its 50-day Moving Average on September 24, 2020 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

Following a +19.51% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where TBK advanced for three days, in 221 of 309 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 72%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/10427806-triumph-bancorp-s-tbk-92-49-moving-average-convergence-divergence-macd-histogram-just-turned-positive?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=blog)
